name: AutoSizeOptions
summary: Options for controlling how the sheet size is calculated when the SizeDefinitionMode is AutoSize.

enum_values.name: CalculatedSizes
enum_values.summary: Use "calculated size" values of the selected layout in the drawing.

enum_values.name: FixedSizes
enum_values.summary: Use "fixed size" values of the selected layout in the drawing.

enum_values.name: CalculatedAndFixedSizes
enum_values.summary: Use both "fixed size" and "calculated size" values of the selected layout in the drawing.
